mapper.insert: insert into dispatch_record (dispatcher_id, scooter_id, status, end_time, create_time) values (#{dispatcherId}, #{scooterId}, #{status}, #{endTime}, #{createTime})
mapper.select: select id, dispatcher_id, scooter_id, status, end_time, create_time from dispatch_record where dispatcher_id = #{dispatcherId} and scooter_id = #{scooterId} and status = 0 order by id desc limit 1
select id, dispatcher_id, scooter_id, status, end_time, create_time from dispatch_record where scooter_id = #{scooterId} and status = 0 order by id desc limit 1
mapper.update: update dispatch_record set status = 1, end_time = now() where id = #{id}
mapper.select: select dr.id, s.code as scooter_code, dr.create_time as start_time, dr.end_time, dr.status, s.ride_status, s.fault_status, s.battery from dispatch_record dr left join scooter s on s.id = dr.scooter_id where dr.dispatcher_id = #{dispatcherId} order by dr.id desc
